testcase.name: test_rewards_history_with_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get Rizza's token assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_123_rewards.py:101: in test_rewards_history_with_auth assert token is not None, "Failed to get Rizza's token" E AssertionError: Failed to get Rizza's token E assert None is not None
